letters.commonTitle: Start with the letters people see most often
letters.commonBlurb: If you're not sure where to begin, these are the notices newcomers most often need help decoding.

detail.documentsYes: Likely yes — gather supporting documents before you respond.
detail.documentsNo: Usually no extra documents are needed for the first step.
detail.verifyReminder: Editorial guidance for a common version of this letter — confirm the amount, dates, and case number on your own notice and verify anything unusual with {{issuer}}.
detail.noFixedDeadline: No explicit deadline is highlighted here, but you should still act on the next step promptly.

glossary.title: Bureaucratic Hebrew, demystified
glossary.blurb: Common terms you'll see on official letters, with a transliteration so you can pronounce them when phoning the office.

about.title: About Mikhtav
about.body: Mikhtav is an educational guide to common Israeli bureaucratic letters. It does not republish any government data and is not legal advice — verify your specific letter with the issuing authority.

disclaimer: Educational information only — verify your specific letter with the issuing authority.
